arts.ttl: PSG set to bank €12m in matchday revenue from hosting Arsenal in the Champions League semi-finals
arts.sum: PSG are expected to bank €12m in matchday revenue alone from hosting Arsenal in the Champions League semi-final return leg, according to Le Parisien. PSG’s Parc des Princes will be…

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard and Riccardo Calafiori decision made as £50m man drops out: Arsenal predicted starting XI vs PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to reach the Champions League final for just the second time in their history when they take on Paris Saint-Germain in Wednesday’s...

arts.ttl: ‘A massive club with a huge history’ – Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta recalls his playing days at PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has made an emotional return to Parc des Princes ahead of the Champions League semi-final return leg against PSG. The Arsenal head coach has fond memories of the…

arts.ttl: Arsenal don't fear Paris Saint-Germain but need to create a 'magic moment' says Declan Rice as Gunners target first Champions League final since 2006
arts.sum: The Gunners go into this semi-final second leg on the back of last week's 1-0 loss to PSG with a final shot to salvage their season.It leaves the Gunners with a tall task.

arts.ttl: Rice: Arsenal need 'magic moments' to beat PSG
arts.sum: Declan Rice said Arsenal will require "magic moments" to reach their first Champions League final in 19 years.

arts.ttl: Arteta: Arsenal are here to make history against PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal are ready to do something exceptional and start their own history by beating Paris Saint-Germain and reaching the Champions League final.

arts.ttl: Preview: Can Arsenal overcome PSG to reach the Champions League final?
arts.sum: The French champions looked like they were toying with Arsenal for the first 30 minutes of last week’s first leg and had two huge late chances to score a second goal on the break and all but end the tie. Ousmane Dembele’s early strike quickly quietened a raucous Emirates Stadium last Tuesday and PSG had late chances to score a second goal after Mikel Merino's effort for Arsenal was ruled out for offside and Gianluigi Donnarumma stood firm in goal to keep the visitors ahead.

arts.ttl: ‘We are here to make history’ – Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta defiant before Champions League semi-final return leg against PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta is adamant the Gunners have what it takes to wipe out a one-goal deficit and eventually knock PSG out of the Champions League semi-finals. The…

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta issues Jurrien Timber and Riccardo Calafiori injury update ahead of PSG decider
arts.sum: The pair were both able to train on Tuesday

arts.ttl: PSG vs. Arsenal: Mikel Arteta told "the only way" Gunners will pull off Champions League comeback
arts.sum: Arsenal and Mikel Arteta are told the "only way" they will beat Paris Saint-Germain and reach the Champions League final in Wednesday's semi-final second leg.
